Course Title: Design Errors at Scale with AI Tools
Category: Infrastructure & Construction: Construction, Engineering, Building Materials, Real Estate Development
Who is this for: Construction managers, project managers, civil engineers, structural engineers, architects, building designers, real estate developers, construction supervisors, engineering technicians, design coordinators
Team or Dept this is for: Engineering, Construction, Project Management, Operations, Design, Real Estate Development
Description: How small mistakes can propagate across entire projects.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with construction or engineering project workflows, along with a willingness to explore how AI tools are used in design and planning processes, is all you need to get started.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common design errors that occur in construction and engineering projects and explain how small mistakes can propagate across entire project workflows when AI tools are involved. You will also apply practical strategies to recognise early warning signs of error propagation, helping you to minimise risk and protect the integrity of large-scale infrastructure and building developments.
